reference: Hi. There is no way this can be cancerous at the age of nineteen, for sure. Most probably this is a sebaceous cyst, and simple excision will help in two ways: first, the removal of the cyst, and secondly, histopathology reports to confirm that this is not cancerous.
text: Hi, there is no way this can be cancerous at the age of 19 for sure. Most probably this is a sebaceous cyst, and simple excision will help in two ways. First, the removal of the cyst and secondly, histopathology reports confirm that this is not cancerous.
